mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_ai_report_survey WHERE user_id = #{userSn} AND report_id IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_ai_report_survey (user_id, report_id, question_no, rating, opinion) VALUES (#{userSn}, NULL, #{d.questionNo}, #{d.rating}, #{d.opinion})
INSERT INTO sys_user_activity_log (user_id, action_type, action_value, target_type) VALUES (#{userSn}, 'thumbs', #{value}, 'report')
